note_on_data: Patch fixing a user-reported RENDER defect (overlay text wrapping). UAT-confirmed fixed by the user. Shipped v1.1.2.

defects.title: Expanded overlay text wraps — 'System only' → 3 lines, 'Pause' → 2 lines
defects.root_cause: 248px panel too narrow for content + no lineLimit on labels → HStack compresses + wraps

notes: SYSTEMIC FINDING: this is the 2nd RENDER defect to reach the user (after the v1.1.1 height P3) — both because the floating overlay is NEVER rendered/screenshot in QA. qa-editor is source-level; the main loop can't headlessly screenshot an NSPanel; the USER is currently the only render check (harness H2). Caught + fixed cleanly once reported; the fix run built+QA'd first-pass. Promotion: Gate-C 'text containment (RENDER-verify)' check added. Open: overlay auto-size-to-content (robust follow-up).
